ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (school or municipality) */,
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant type (e.g., school safety, environmental protection) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the grant */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the grant and items/services purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., awarded, in progress, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_grant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_type_id") REFERENCES grant_types ("grant_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the school or municipality */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the recipient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the recipient */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the recipient */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., school, municipality) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_types" (
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant type */,
  "grant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the grant type (e.g., safety, education) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the grant type (e.g., school safety, environmental protection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant status */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded or updated */,
  "amount_disbursed" REAL /* Amount disbursed to date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., awarded, in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the grant status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_status_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, grant recipient) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the grant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the grant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_expenses_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., progress, final) */,
  "file" TEXT /* File containing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., progress, final) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_evaluations_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "amendment_type" TEXT /* Type of amendment (e.g., budget, scope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_amendments_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)
